svg.title: VidyuthLabs PCB Outline – 80×60mm with SPE Zone
svg.desc: Rounded rectangle PCB outline 80mm × 60mm with mounting holes, USB-C edge, electrode zone, and component placement regions. Scale: 1px = 0.125mm (8px per mm)
svg.text: Corner radius: R4mm · Mounting holes: M3 Ø3.2mm · 4 corners at (6.5, 6.5), (73.5, 6.5), (6.5, 53.5), (73.5, 53.5) mm
